name: GitHub
one_liner: Code hosting, version control and CI/CD platform.
auth_note: Fine-grained/classic personal access tokens, OAuth apps, and GitHub App installation tokens; all self-generated.
access_note: Free account; create PAT or OAuth/GitHub App instantly. Higher rate limits when authenticated.

name: Vercel
one_liner: Frontend cloud for deploying and hosting web apps.
auth_note: Bearer access tokens created in account settings (scopable to teams); OAuth for building integrations.
access_note: Free/hobby account; create access token instantly. All endpoints under api.vercel.com.
mcp_note: Official Vercel MCP server documented at vercel.com/docs/mcp.

name: Netlify
one_liner: Web hosting and serverless platform for frontend sites.
auth_note: Personal access tokens (Bearer) generated in UI; OAuth2 for public integrations.
access_note: Free account; generate PAT instantly. REST base api.netlify.com/api/v1.
mcp_note: Official Netlify MCP server (uses personal access token).

name: Cloudflare
one_liner: CDN, DNS, edge compute and network security platform.
auth_note: Scoped API tokens (user or account) self-created in dashboard; legacy global API key also supported.
access_note: Free account; create scoped tokens instantly with granular permissions.

name: Supabase
auth_note: Management API uses personal access token; per-project auto-gen REST/GraphQL use anon/service API keys; OAuth for third-party apps.
access_note: Free tier project; generate access token instantly. Auto-generated APIs per project.

name: Neo4j
one_liner: Native graph database with Cypher query language.
auth_note: Query API/Bolt use basic auth (user:password) or tokens; Aura provisioning API uses OAuth client credentials.
access_note: Free Aura tier / self-managed; HTTP Query API enabled by default on current versions.
mcp_note: Official Neo4j MCP server (neo4j/mcp) plus Neo4j Labs community servers.

name: Snowflake
one_liner: Cloud data warehouse and analytics platform.
auth_note: SQL REST API authenticates via OAuth or key-pair (RSA) JWT; key-pair setup adds friction.
access_note: Self-serve 30-day free trial for credentials; production requires paid account.
mcp_note: Official Snowflake-managed MCP server and Snowflake-Labs/mcp (Cortex AI).
main_blocker: Key-pair/JWT auth setup complexity and trial-only free credentials.

name: MongoDB Atlas
auth_note: Admin API uses Service Accounts (OAuth2 client-credentials, recommended) or API keys with HTTP digest auth.
access_note: Free M0 tier; create keys/service accounts instantly. Admin API v2 REST.
mcp_note: Official MongoDB MCP server (mongodb-js/mongodb-mcp-server) covers Atlas.

name: Datadog
one_liner: Cloud monitoring, observability and security platform.
auth_note: Requires DD-API-KEY header plus DD-APPLICATION-KEY for many endpoints; both self-generated.
access_note: Self-serve 14-day free trial / limited free tier; keys created in UI. Region-specific site.
mcp_note: Official Datadog MCP server (OAuth via marketplace, preview).

name: Sentry
one_liner: Application error monitoring and performance tracing.
auth_note: Bearer auth tokens (org/user/internal integration); OAuth for public integrations.
access_note: Free tier account; generate auth tokens instantly. Web API v0.
